candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Sample solutions of each of the three acids were titrated with 0.10 M sodium hydroxide, NaOH. Each of the acid solutions had a concentration of 0.10 M. Which of the acid titrations had the highest pH at the endpoint?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
根据下图中有关酸的信息回答问题。三种酸中每一种的0.10 M样品溶液用0.10 M氢氧化钠 $\text{NaOH}$ 滴定。哪些酸在滴定终点时的 pH 值最高?

A. 甲酸
B. 苯甲酸
C. 氯乙酸
D. 它们在终点的 pH 值相同为 7
metadata.explanation_zh: 在当量点时,最弱酸(具有最小离解常数$K_a$)将具有最高的pH值。
